title: justicia callothamnum
intro: Justicia callothamnum, also known as the Indian trumpet, is a flowering plant belonging to the Acanthaceae family. This plant is traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine, where it is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Justicia callothamnum include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, and treating various skin conditions like eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of Justicia callothamnum can be consumed as teas, infusions, or decoctions, or applied topically in the form of creams or ointments.
